situations: You work at a grocery store and a customer asks where things are.
A customer is looking for halal meat or fish.
A customer needs help finding ingredients.
A parent brings a sick child to the clinic.
A patient asks how to see a doctor.
Someone asks where the pharmacy is.
A passenger asks which bus goes downtown.
A passenger asks how much the fare is.
Someone asks where to get off the bus.
A parent asks how to register their child for school.
A parent asks where the classroom is.
Someone asks about school hours.
A caller reports a fire in their building and needs help.
A caller says someone has collapsed and is unresponsive.
A caller reports a car accident and needs an ambulance.
Someone reports that their bag or wallet was stolen.
Someone is lost and needs help finding their address.
Someone wants to report a suspicious person near their home.
A patient arrives with chest pain and needs to be checked in.
A parent brings a child with a high fever to the ER.
Someone arrives after a fall and thinks they may have broken a bone.
A family arrives at a shelter after fleeing a dangerous situation.
Someone asks if the shelter has space for them and their children.
Someone asks about food, blankets, and sleeping arrangements at the shelter.
